title: ANC - 4.-ANC is ON and its value is either Adaptive or Standard and User doesn’t change value during call when Transparency is OFF without selected values
scenario: ANC remains ON and Transparency Mode is greyed out during a call, then returns to normal toggle behavior after call ends
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Set ANC to ON with either 'Adaptive' or 'Standard' mode selected.
5. Ensure Transparency Mode is OFF with no value selected.
6. Make or receive a call using the Poly device.
7. During the call, observe the ANC setting in Audio Settings.
8. During the call, observe the Transparency Mode setting in Audio Settings.
9. During the call, tap on Transparency Mode.
11. After the call ends, observe the ANC setting in Audio Settings.
12. After the call ends, observe the Transparency Mode setting in Audio Settings.
13. Tap on Transparency Mode and toggle it ON, then toggle back to OFF.
14. Toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
expected: 1. ANC remains ON with the previously selected option (Adaptive or Standard) during the call. 2. Transparency Mode is greyed out and inaccessible during the call. 3. Tapping Transparency Mode during the call shows a popup stating the option is unavailable during a call. 4. After the call ends, ANC remains ON with the previously selected value. 5. After the call ends, Transparency Mode remains OFF with no value selected. 6. After the call, the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
